title: Tatakae! Osper
synopsis: Based on a story by Yamano Kouichi. On a distant world, people with paranormal powers battle each other.

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

title: Akindo Sei no Little Peso
titleNative: アキンド星のリトル・ペソ
synopsis: The planet of Akindo is the best planet in the universe at earning money. Prince Peso, the planet's ruler, lives a bum's life of playing smartphone games every day, always concentrated on paying micro-transactions. One day, the king demands that all the money in the universe be brought to him, and Peso and his lackeys are cast out. Now, Peso travels the universe, meeting aliens and fighting them in business battles. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Xing Hai Qishi Part 2
synopsis: The second part of the first season of Xing Hai Qishi .

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Dr. Slump: Arale-chan - Penguin Mura no Shouboutai
titleRomaji: Dr. Slump: Arale-chan - Penguin Mura no Shouboutai
titleNative: Dr.スランプ アラレちゃん ペンギン村の消防隊
synonyms: Dr. Slump Arale-chan Penguin Village Fire Brigade
synopsis: The cast of Dr. Slump: Arale-chan help promote fire safety.

title: Chou Seimeitai Transformers Beast Wars Metals: Convoy Daihenshin!
titleRomaji: Chou Seimeitai Transformers Beast Wars Metals: Convoy Daihenshin!
titleNative: 超生命体トランスフォーマー ビーストウォーズ・メタルス コンボイ大変身!
synonyms: Beast Wars Metals: Convoy Great Transformation
synopsis: Released theatrically as part of a triple feature of animated films based on Takara properties. The other two short movies included were "Super Doll Licca-chan" and "Microman". Due to the relatively late theatrical release, the episode was not included on Pioneer's Japanese DVD box set of Beast Wars Metals. (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Super Power
tags.description: Prominently features characters with special abilities that allow them to do what would normally be physically or logically impossible.

title: Ganbare! Marine Kid
titleNative: がんばれ！マリンキッド
synopsis: An expansion of the original Dolphin Ouji series. Character names were altered, (changing 'Dolphin Prince' to 'Marine Kid' and 'Neptuna' to 'Neptina'), characters were added and concepts expanded. In order to distance the new series from the original trial episodes, the series was re-titled Ganbare! Marine Kid. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Mugen Senki Portriss
synopsis: In a raving world, legendary knights stood up. Will they become gods of war or world saviors? Three Portriss Knights and sole human boy are now going to change the World! Portriss Planet, home of where robots live in peace. However, this peacefulness was ruined by the sudden appearance of a Dictator "Dark Portriss". Dark Portriss plans to attain infinite powers through the use of the "Space-time destroying Cannon". The only ones able to stop this are the Portriss Knights! A boy, Yuuma, accidentally got into the Portriss World, and the Portrisses` adventure begins! (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

title: Savior Of The Earth
synopsis: When evil Doctor Butler uses his Dark Energy to throw the world into the state of chaos, three heroes enter the electronic world to capture him and save humanity.

title: BLUE GALE XABUNGLE SIDE R
synopsis: BLUE GALE XABUNGLE SIDE R is a "experimental video" by Sunrise Robot Laboratory, the video reinterprets the world of Xabungle in a dynamic animation style that nevertheless evokes the often humorous and exaggerated tone of the original anime with the musical accompaniment of The IDOLM@STER Shiny Colors song "Ranburu" by Houkago Climax Girls. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

tags.name: Real Robot
tags.description: Prominently features mechanical designs loosely influenced by real-world robotics.

tags.name: Robots
tags.description: Prominently features humanoid machines.

title: Chenmo Zhi Lan
synopsis: The story takes place in the City of Sin in a future galaxy: In order to adapt to the changes brought about by technology, a large number of galactic citizens have undergone a high degree of physical modification. However, a group of "cyborgs" has become weaponized, and a series of riots have occurred, plunging the galaxy into unprecedented turmoil. The culprit behind is a high-tech criminal organization codenamed "Illum". In order to fight this evil force, the "Tacit Blue" investigation team led by Carl was established. They began a life-and-death confrontation with Illum, and discovered the shocking conspiracy behind the cyborg riot... During this time, each member of Tacit Blue had to face their own past and scars, and learn to face and redeem themselves, all while saving the galaxy.

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Konpora Kid
synopsis: The time is set in the Mechatronics Era in the future. In this era, schools actually float in the Tokyo sky at around 2000 - 3000 metres. At home, there is freedom in movement as everyone has a flight mechanism within them which allows them to fly. Transportation is made easy as a result. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

title: Sakyo Komatsu's Animation Theater
synopsis: A collection of short sci-fi series.

title: Shi Shi Chuanshuo
synopsis: Ye Chong, who grew up alone on an unknown garbage star, accidentally activated a unique artificial intelligence mecha, Mu Shang. Although they escaped together from the garbage planet where the star disaster occurred, they were involved in unexpected conspiracies and chaos. How many unknowns are waiting for him in this vast universe? (Source: v.qq.com, translated)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Dushi Gu Xian Yi
synopsis: Ye Bufan, a junior student, tried to scam a car to raise medical expenses for his mother. Unexpectedly, he encountered a female driver who did not play by the rules. After being hit, Ye Bufan accidentally traveled to a fantasy world and obtained the inheritance of ancient medicine. From then on, he mastered medical skills, practiced martial arts, and won the favor of countless beautiful women.

title: Choujin Locke: Pilot Film
titleNative: 超人ロック パイロットフィルム
synopsis: In 1979, before the movie Choujin Locke was produced, this short pilot was made. It can be now found on the the extras of the official DVD release of the movie.

synopsis: New Onegai☆Teacher anime project initiated after the 20th anniversary of the series and the closure of Lake Kizaki Capeground.

title: Dolphin Ouji
synopsis: Produced as a short experimental trial series of only 3 episodes and filmed in black and white, Dolphin Prince aired on Fuji TV on Sundays at 7.30pm. The episodes featured young Dolphin Prince, his mermaid friend Neptuna and Dr. Mariner, with stories entitled "Secret Of The Red Vortex", "Call Of The Sea" and "Attack Of The Sea-Star People". (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Neo Atom Tanjou
synonyms: The Birth of Neo Astro Boy
synopsis: In the short, Astro Boy gives his life to save a densely populated space colony from a collision with the sun. The doctor Black Jack saves him, reborn to a new identity as Neo Astro Boy. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: This short movie was shown as part of the PASONA NATUREVERSE booth at Expo 2025 in Osaka, Japan.

title: Koutetsu no Vendetta Episode 0
synopsis: After several years in the military, Rain Yashima has grown impatient and frustrated. The Japanese army was not going on the offensive at all, and there was an overwhelming difference in the level of weaponry between them and the enemy army, the Seventh. At this rate, it would only be a matter of time before they lost the war, let alone overturn their inferior position. Then a ray of hope landed on Rain's doorstep. In her hands is the power to judge history, and in her hands is the power to weave history. The girl abandons her womanhood and vows to fight as steel. Now, Yashima Rain's lonely war begins. (Source: Video description, Translated) Note: The project began as a series of doujin shorts by the unit Thumbnail, agreed to produce the anime. The project was announced in 2009 to be produced by the Japanese arm of the French company Ankama Games. Production halted in 2011 due to the dissolution of the production division of its sponsor Ankama Japan, to later release in 2013. To date,
